evidence: Coordinated with cross-functional teams, including development, design, and quality assurance, to ensure seamless project execution (However, I've found that my team's communication style often leads to misunderstandings and delays).

Developed and maintained project plans, including scope statements, timelines, and resource allocation plans (I've had some issues with scope creep in the past, but have learned to adapt and adjust plans accordingly).

Conducted regular project status updates, progress reports, and risk assessments to identify potential issues (Unfortunately, I've struggled with providing timely and accurate status updates due to my tendency to overcommit on tasks).

Managed project budgets, tracked expenses, and ensured compliance with organizational financial policies (I've had some issues with budgeting in the past, but have since implemented new processes to improve accuracy).
